features.name: Dendrogram Viewer
features.description: An interactive tree viewer for hierarchical data, supporting zoom, pan, node selection, and row-highlight synced with the grid.
features.evidence_summary: The viewer function, its backing service, and tree-helper share the 'Dendrogram'/'dendrogramService'/'treeHelper' naming root; the demo apps exercise the viewer directly and the help guide documents it.

features.name: Hierarchical Clustering
features.description: Computes hierarchical clustering on tabular data (numeric features, sequences, or molecules) via Python scripts and injects the resulting Newick tree into the grid.
features.evidence_summary: All four user-callable functions share the 'Hierarchical Clustering' name and description 'injects tree to grid', backed by three Python scripts for distance/tree computation, with two demo apps and a tree-generation dialog.

features.name: Tree-in-Grid Rendering
features.description: Renders a dendrogram as a resizable neighbor panel alongside the data grid, with an interactive cut-off slider that assigns rows to clusters.
features.evidence_summary: Three demo apps named 'treeForGrid*' exercise the custom grid renderer and cut-off slider; changelog entries confirm a resizable neighbor panel, cut-slider indicator, and cluster assignment by cut-off.

features.name: Newick File Import and Preview
features.description: Registers file handlers for .nwk/.newick files, enabling import into Datagrok and inline preview of Newick-format phylogenetic trees.
features.evidence_summary: importNwk (role: fileHandler, ext: nwk/newick) and previewNewick (role: fileViewer, fileViewer: nwk/newick) are both explicitly bound to Newick file extensions with no ambiguity.
